content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Cut Ribbon". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/189/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the length of the ribbon. The second line contains three integers a, b, and c, which are the possible lengths of the pieces.
content.outputFormat: The maximum number of pieces that can be cut from the ribbon.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to find the maximum number of pieces that can be cut from the ribbon.

code.Python3:
def max(a, b):
    return a if a > b else b

def cutRibbon(n, a, b, c):
    dp = [-1] * (n + 1)
    dp[0] = 0
    for i in range(1, n + 1):
        if i >= a: dp[i] = max(dp[i], dp[i - a] + 1) if dp[i - a] != -1 else -1
        if i >= b: dp[i] = max(dp[i], dp[i - b] + 1) if dp[i - b] != -1 else -1
        if i >= c: dp[i] = max(dp[i], dp[i - c] + 1) if dp[i - c] != -1 else -1
    return dp[n]

def main():
    n = int(input())
    a, b, c = map(int, input().split())
    print(cutRibbon(n, a, b, c))

main()
